name: A664isICMP
title: A664isICMP
syntax: long A664isICMP (a664Frame aFrame, dword dstIP, word VLid) (2)
description: This function returns the ICMP type and code for a packet. The intended use case is a check for an expected ICMP packet in an on-handler. The packet is checked according to the following rules:

parameters.name: aFrame
parameters.description: The frame object of type a664Frame to be checked.

parameters.name: NodeName
parameters.description: (1) This is the name of a node from the assigned DBC. The DBC must be an AFDX DBC file and the necessary attributes must exist.

parameters.name: dstIP
parameters.description: (2) destination IP address to be used for check.

parameters.name: VLid
parameters.description: (2) VLId to be used for check.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
